Dental Care
description: General dental care for adults and children. Treatment of dental caries (tooth cavities).

name: Children’s Dental Care
description: Children’s dental services by friendly and experienced doctors, children’s cabinet in Tähesaju

name: Prosthetics
description: Oral removable and non-removable and combined dentures

name: Aesthetic Services
description: Teeth whitening, professional cleaning, Air-Flow, dental decorations

name: Root Canal Treatment
description: The goal of root canal therapy is to bring the intra-dental environment to a state where the disease can be cured, the tooth will remain symptom-free, and will survive for many years to come.

name: Oral Surgery
description: Maxillofacial surgery. Intraoral operations for the treatment of various diseases, traumas and defects

name: Implantology
description: Treatment and technology related to the artificial tooth root or implant

name: Gum Plastic
description: A surgical procedure that solves medical and aesthetic problems, “growing” or removing gum tissue.

name: Orthodontics
description: Correcting the position of the teeth with braces for both children and adults

name: Orthodontical Aligners
description: Correcting the position of the teeth with the help of transparent aligners, Invisalign aligner treatment

name: Myofunctional Therapy
description: Help with various myofunctional disorders, including teeth grinding, pain sensations in the neck, etc

name: Periodontitis Treatment
description: Periodontology, also known as gum disease, involves the prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of periodontal diseases

name: Osteopathy
description: A treatment method aimed at restoring the functionality of the structure (muscle tone, integrity of connective tissue structures, etc.)

name: Emergency Dental Care
description: Emergency dental care appointments for urgent problems. Book an appointment by calling reception!

name: Diagnistics
description: Panorama and 3D X-ray

name: Sealants
description: protect teeth from decay by covering their surface with a protective layer

name: ICON Caries Treatment
description: An innovative solution for early treatment of caries

name: Remotherapy
description: helps strengthen tooth enamel and make it more resistant to decay

name: Dental Laminates
description: suitable for protecting teeth and hiding defects in more severe cases

name: Laminates
description: full-ceramic veneers to cover the front teeth. Laminates can be used to change the color, the shape, and slightly, the size and position of the teeth.

name: Dental bridgework
description: a type of prosthesis used to replace missing teeth, where pontic will be attached to the existing abutment teeth. Can be produced using a wide variety of materials (see dental crown).

name: Dental crown
description: an artificial crown (full ceramic, precious metal alloy, or zirconia) to cover the patient’s teeth for aesthetic or functional indications.

name: Post and core
description: a post and core (from metal or fiber) will be produced to fix the artificial crown for teeth with a decomposed crown.

name: Dental in-lays and on-lays
description: a micro-prosthesis, also known as a dental laboratory-made indirect filling, which thoroughly restores the anatomy of a single tooth. Can be produced from different materials (ceramics, precious metal alloys, zirconia).

name: Cast partial denture
description: a prosthesis with a metal frame and plastic base with accurate metal clasps as fixation elements.

name: Plastic partial denture
description: a partial denture made of plastic.

name: Complete dentures
description: Type of prosthesis used to replace the teeth when the full arch of teeth is missing. Can be produced in a variety of plastic materials. (Acrylic resin, Deflex, Evolon). Soft lining can be inserted into the denture base.

name: Dentures fixed with a locking system
description: Artificial crowns will be placed onto the patient’s teeth with attached retention elements (locks). Missing teeth will be replaced with a removable denture attached to the locks.

name: Root-supported over-denture
description: This denture can be used if the patient maintains few natural teeth but the root canals of the remaining teeth have been properly treated. Special retention elements (root locks) will be attached to the root canals of the patient’s natural teeth and a removable denture will be attached to these locks.

name: Telescope dentures
description: A specially shaped metal fixture (primary crown) will be attached to existing teeth. Secondary crowns are attached to the removable part of the denture and retention takes place using frictional force between primary and secondary crowns.

name: Implant-supported dentures
description: We use the high-quality ANKYLOS Implant System. Individual dental crowns as well as bridgework can be attached to dental implants. It is possible to reconstruct a full dental arch. Implant abutments can also be used to attach removable dentures.

name: Dental Air-Flow soda wash and pearl cleaning
description: These procedures are performed in a dental clinic. During soda wash, granulated soda, air, and water pressure act on the teeth, which cleans the teeth of pigment. Hard-to-reach places, such as tight spaces between teeth, can also be cleaned during a soda wash. Tartar must be removed before cleaning, it is not removed during soda wash. During this procedure, your teeth will become cleaner and brighter.

name: ZOOM-whitening at the dental clinic
description: In this whitening procedure, the teeth are first cleaned with a cleaning paste. The gums are then covered with a gum protection gel to prevent the whitening gel from flowing from the tooth surface onto the gums. Once the mucous membrane is protected, a whitening gel is applied to the teeth, which is activated by light rays from a special ZOOM lamp. The procedure lasts 15 minutes and can be repeated up to 4 times. At the end of the procedure, the gel and gum protection are removed. The entire procedure takes 1.5-2 hours.

name: Sapphire dental whitening
description: The Denmat Sapphire Whitening or Lumismile teeth whitening system is effective, fast and safe. The Lumismile whitening system helps to achieve a smile up to 8 shades whiter with minimal time and minimal tooth sensitivity

name: LED teeth whitening BlancOne
description: Blanc-One is a relatively new whitening system that uses LED lighting with a specially formulated whitening gel. BlancOne Click and Touch whitening gels contain only 5.6% hydrogen peroxide, the use of which in teeth whitening has also been approved by the Estonian Health Board.

name: Teeth whitening with trays at home
description: To do this, impressions are taken of the patient’s teeth, based on which trays are made in the dental laboratory. The tray is an individual mold made of soft plastic, into which whitening gel is applied and which is then placed on the teeth. The gel tray is applied at night (the gel is active for 8-10 hours).

name: Whitening of a single tooth
description: If a single tooth in a row has changed color, the above whitening methods will not work on it. In this case, a small hole is drilled on the palate or tongue side surface of the tooth, the old filling is removed, and a special whitening gel is placed in the tooth. The hole created in the tooth is temporarily closed with a filling, and the procedure is repeated every 3-5 days until the desired result is achieved.

name: Tooth Gems or Crystals – Dental Decorations
description: Dental decorations are tiny crystal figurines that are glued to the tooth without damaging the tooth enamel.

name: Installation of Tooth Gems
description: The procedure takes about 15 minutes and is completely painless.

name: Removal of Tooth Gems
description: The surface of the tooth is smooth and undamaged even after the decoration is removed.

name: Maintenance of Tooth Gems
description: A properly installed and maintained tooth gem should last on the tooth for years.

name: Root Canal Therapy with Microscope
description: Root canal treatment under a microscope is the most modern way to perform root canal treatment.
